history.content: Hey claw, use my browser and go on youtube and look up videos about openclaw
Chrome needs remote debugging enabled. Right-click Chrome's shortcut → Properties → add `--remote-debugging-port=9222` to the Target field → restart Chrome. Then try again! 🦞
Can you change that for me
Sure! Here's a concise version: Add `--remote-debugging-port=9222` to Chrome's shortcut Target → restart → try again. 🦞
